Class KeYRecoderExcHandler

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.KeYRecoderExcHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ErrorHandler, ModelUpdateListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
SimpleRIFLExceptionHandler
public class KeYRecoderExcHandler extends Object implements ErrorHandler

    • getErrorThreshold

      public int getErrorThreshold()
      Description copied from interface: ErrorHandler
      Returns the number of errors that this error handler accepts before stopping the current analysis.
      Specified by:
      getErrorThreshold in interface ErrorHandler

    • setErrorThreshold

      public final void setErrorThreshold(int maxCount)
      Description copied from interface: ErrorHandler
      Sets the number of errors that this error handler accepts before stopping the current analysis. Setting this value to zero results in a fail at once behavior.
      Specified by:
      setErrorThreshold in interface ErrorHandler

    • recoderExitAction

      protected void recoderExitAction()

    • reportError

      public void reportError(Exception e)
      Description copied from interface: ErrorHandler
      Handles exceptions and may return so that the callee can attempt to resume or fail, throwing the given error as an exception.
      Specified by:
      reportError in interface ErrorHandler
      Parameters:
      e - an error cause.

    • modelUpdating

      public void modelUpdating(EventObject event)
      Description copied from interface: ModelUpdateListener
      Informs the listener that the meta model is now being updated.
      Specified by:
      modelUpdating in interface ModelUpdateListener
      Parameters:
      event - an event object containing the change history service as source.

    • modelUpdated

      public void modelUpdated(EventObject event)
      Description copied from interface: ModelUpdateListener
      Informs the listener that the meta model has been updated.
      Specified by:
      modelUpdated in interface ModelUpdateListener
      Parameters:
      event - an event object containing the change history service as source.
